data.user_prompt: Who offers in-home therapy or community-based mental health support in Louisville?
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response chat_gpt Who offers in-home therapy or community-based mental health support in Louisvill

sections.text:
Here are some Louisville-area organizations that offer **in-home / home-based therapy** and/or **community-based mental health support** (case management, wraparound services, etc.)—the right fit depends a lot on **age (youth vs. adult)**, **severity**, and **insurance/eligibility**.

## In-home / home-based services
- **KVC Kentucky (in-home behavioral health & family support)**
  - Home- and community-based mental/behavioral health services (often for youth/families).
  - ([kentucky.kvc.org](https://kentucky.kvc.org/?utm_source=openai))

- **StepStone Family & Youth Services – Intensive In-Home Program (youth)**
  - Intensive in-home care for children/adolescents (ages **5–18**) when mental/behavioral/emotional illness is causing significant impairment and risk of out-of-home placement.
  - ([stepstoneyouth.com](https://www.stepstoneyouth.com/family-and-youth-services/in-home/?utm_source=openai))

## Community-based mental health support (case management, outpatient supports, connection to services)
- **Wellspring (case management + housing + behavioral health supports)**
  - Community supports such as **case management** and **housing** alongside behavioral health needs.
  - ([wellspringky.org](https://wellspringky.org/what-we-do/?utm_source=openai))

- **Louisville Mental Health Group – Case Management**
  - Focuses on connecting people to **community resources** (housing, employment, medical care, transportation, etc.).
  - ([louisvillementalhealth.org](https://louisvillementalhealth.org/case-management/?utm_source=openai))

- **Creative Spirits Behavioral Health (community-based services)**
  - Provides mental health care described as **community-based services** (listed Louisville area).
  - ([creativespiritsonline.com](https://www.creativespiritsonline.com/?utm_source=openai))

- **Kilgore Samaritan Counseling Center (services for adults + community education/outreach)**
  - Offers counseling and community-oriented services in the Louisville area.
  - ([kilgorecounseling.org](https://kilgorecounseling.org/services/?utm_source=openai))

- **One’s Journey Through Life, LLC (therapy + social support; adults/families)**
  - Therapy agency providing integrated support for adults/families dealing with mental health and related stressors.
  - ([onesjourneythroughlife.org](https://onesjourneythroughlife.org/?utm_source=openai))

- **Norton Healthcare – Behavioral Health (connection to community providers)**
  - Norton can help connect patients to longer-term community providers after an initial level of care.
  - ([nortonhealthcare.com](https://nortonhealthcare.com/services-and-conditions/behavioral-health/?utm_source=openai))

- **LouisvilleKY.gov – Community Mental Health Services (directory-style resource)**
  - City resource page pointing people toward community mental health help.
  - ([louisvilleky.gov](https://louisvilleky.gov/government/health-wellness/community-mental-health-services?utm_source=openai))

## Quick questions so I can narrow it to the best 3 options for you
1) Is this for **a child/youth (under 18)** or **an adult**?  
2) Are you looking specifically for **therapy in the home**, or is **community-based case management + outpatient** okay?  
3) Do you have **insurance**
